title: Vortex Web runtime and community update
summary: Vortex Web continues the move away from the old 2+2 client with runtime migration work, profile cosmetics, cleaner in-game UI foundations, and hosted multiplayer improvements.
changelog: Added Vortex Web profile cosmetics, including badges, name gradients, effects, nameplates, and profile backgrounds.
Added badge selection controls, including the option to hide your selected badge, with more reliable profile-page controls.
Improved leaderboard cosmetic rendering so selected badges and nameplates can appear in game.
Continued moving input, settings, HUD, physics, chat, and leaderboard foundations into the new web-client runtime.
Added Rapier-backed runtime physics plumbing and client-side test utilities while keeping gameplay compatibility first.
Tightened hosted relay and community-profile flows without exposing implementation details in the client.
